Bills-Ravens and Titans-Colts tilts shape up as the highlights of the early window, and the later part of the day is loaded with a trifecta consisting of Patriots-Packers, Broncos-Raiders and Chiefs-Buccaneers (primetime) showdowns. The Turkey Day triple feature is a rock-solid primer for the rest of the slate, which features a Buccaneers-Browns battle in Cleveland, a Bengals-Titans AFC Divisional Round Game rematch in Tennessee, a Chargers-Chiefs matchup featuring a marquee quarterback showdown and a Rams-Chiefs encounter

A Lamar Jackson-Deshaun Watson showdown in Cleveland is also an eye-catching game in the early window, and a Patriots-Cowboys clash in Dallas highlights the late portion of the schedule.
